John Lamont
MP for the Borders

Heating oil: I want to know your views

  • Tweet

I’ve heard from people across the Borders who have told me that the price of heating oil has doubled in recent days.

This is a deeply worrying time for many local people.

I want to hear your views and experiences. Please fill in my survey below so I can explain the challenges facing local people to the UK Government.



 

Heating Oil: I want to know your views

  • Current Your details
Do you use heating oil to heat your home?
Have you seen the price of your heating oil increase in recent days?
With 0 being not concerned at all, and 10 being very concerned
Is the increase in the price of heating oil likely to leave you or a family member in financial hardship?
Do you think adequate support is being provided by the UK Government and Scottish Government to support people with price increases?
Do you think new regulations should be introduced to prevent companies from profiteering as a result of the war in the Middle East?
Did you know that fuel duty is set to rise by 5p a litre in September?
Do you think the increase to fuel duty should be scrapped?
I would like to be kept up-to-date by the Conservatives on future issues that matter to me:
There will be an easy way to opt out of future messages. For more information on how we handle your data and your rights, please see our Privacy Policy.
The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy. By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.

John Lamont MP for the Borders
